abilities.name: Ancient Ritual
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model moves, it may remove a Glutted token from itself or a Remains marker within 1". If it does so, an ally within 2" may gain either a Focused or Glutted token.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

actions.name: Ritual Knife
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is killed by this action, infuse a (c).

triggers.name: Blood Spray
triggers.text: An ally within 2" of the target gains a Glutted token.

actions.name: Blood Clot
actions.effects: The target heals 1 and allies within (aura)1" of the target heal 1. For each raise this action receives, each model healed this way heals an additional 1.

triggers.name: Meat for the Young
triggers.text: An ally within 6" gains a Glutted token.

actions.name: Black Blood Pustule
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a friendly model with Black Blood.
actions.effects: Resolve the target's Black Blood ability as if it had just suffered damage, and increase the (aura) it generates by +1".

triggers.name: Purification
triggers.text: Remove a token from the target.
